title: Electronic Transactions Association CEO Expecting More Partnerships with Bitcoin Startups
summary: Electronic Transactions Association (ETA) CEO, Jason Oxman, indicated that members of his organization might start recognizing Bitcoin’s disruptive potential, suggesting that this might lead to more partnerships between traditional electronic payment providers and Bitcoin startups.

title: Caspian Pipeline Consortium Halts Loadings After Drone Strike
summary: Oil loading at the Caspian Pipeline Consortium’s terminal on Russia’s Black Sea coast was halted after a drone strike.

title: US, Iran Trade More Attacks After Two Troops Killed in Jordan
summary: The US and Iran engaged in another wave of tit-for-tat attacks, signaling no let-up after strikes by the Islamic Republic killed two American service members in Jordan on Friday.

title: US regulators miss GENIUS Act’s one-year deadline for final stablecoin rules
